# Vibe Design Gallery

Base URL: https://45deg.github.io/vibe-design-gallery/

Use this index to choose one visual theme for restyling an existing interface with Tailwind CSS classes.

## How To Choose A Theme

Given the user's instructions, product context, target audience, brand tone, and any existing implementation details, select the single YAML file whose category, tone, cues, and tokens best match the intended interface.

Prefer themes that reinforce the user's product domain and emotional direction. For operational SaaS, dashboards, admin tools, finance, healthcare, and enterprise workflows, choose restrained, legible, task-focused themes. For games, campaigns, portfolios, restaurants, fashion, education, entertainment, and experimental prototypes, choose more expressive themes only when the context supports it.

After choosing a theme, use its `tokens` as the styling vocabulary. Preserve the provided HTML structure and text. Change only Tailwind class values unless the user explicitly asks for structural changes.

## Output Contract

- Return the finished implementation or rewritten class values requested by the user.
- Do not mention unused themes.
- Maintain accessibility: readable contrast, visible focus states, clear hover states, and disabled states.
- Keep spacing, typography, radius, borders, shadows, and component states consistent with the chosen YAML.

## Theme Files

### Commerce

- [49 Denim Workwear](./49-denim-workwear.yaml): Rugged, durable, blue-collar chic. Cues: denim blue, orange stitching, sturdy fabric, apparel commerce, copper rivets.
- [58 Craft Marketplace](./58-craft-marketplace.yaml): Handmade, friendly, creator-commerce oriented. Cues: handmade marketplace, warm tan, soft teal, creator commerce, artisan cards.
- [92 Banking Pro](./92-banking-pro.yaml): Trustworthy, corporate, crisp. Cues: blue trust palette, clean inputs, financial dashboard, reserved tone, crisp cards.
- [95 Sports Energy](./95-sports-energy.yaml): Athletic, direct, punchy. Cues: orange energy, italic sports type, dark gym surfaces, performance dashboard, bold CTA.
- [103 Tropical Vibe](./103-tropical-vibe.yaml): Vacation, fruity, vibrant, energetic. Cues: teal and flamingo pink, summer vacation, lush leaves, tropical juice, bright commerce.
- [104 Mediterranean](./104-mediterranean.yaml): Travel, hospitality, sunlit. Cues: coastal blue, sunlit orange, hospitality warmth, rounded booking cards, travel landing page.
- [114 Restaurant Menu](./114-restaurant-menu.yaml): Warm, artisanal, inviting. Cues: rose warmth, menu typography, artisan feel, soft food-brand controls, rounded tags.
- [115 E-commerce Sale](./115-e-commerce-sale.yaml): Direct, energetic, retail. Cues: red sale palette, retail urgency, bold CTA, discount-badge mood, direct hierarchy.
- [118 Fintech Gradient](./118-fintech-gradient.yaml): Premium conversion UI. Cues: gradient CTAs, premium fintech, indigo and fuchsia, conversion-focused, smooth cards.
- [122 Travel Postcard](./122-travel-postcard.yaml): Sunny, relaxed, travel-booking friendly. Cues: coastal sky, orange sun, postcard warmth, booking UI, vacation-friendly controls.

### Editorial

- [00 Swiss Grid](./00-swiss-grid.yaml): Precise, modular, typographic. Cues: Swiss typography, red accent, grid discipline, modular panels, objective editorial tone.
- [02 Technical Manual](./02-technical-manual.yaml): Instructional, diagrammatic, exact. Cues: manual cream, technical blue, numbered callouts, diagram labels, industrial documentation.
- [11 Newsroom Broadsheet](./11-newsroom-broadsheet.yaml): Urgent, factual, typographically assertive. Cues: newsprint white, heavy black headlines, signal red rule, column logic, breaking-news hierarchy.
- [24 Editorial Serif](./24-editorial-serif.yaml): Magazine-like, typographic. Cues: serif text, paper background, thin rules, magazine hierarchy, classic editorial rhythm.
- [34 Monochrome Agency](./34-monochrome-agency.yaml): Portfolio, decisive, graphic. Cues: black and white, agency portfolio, strong typographic contrast, hard edges, graphic composition.
- [42 Culinary Zine](./42-culinary-zine.yaml): Seasonal, tactile, independently published. Cues: tomato red, olive ink, uncoated paper, recipe marginalia, indie food magazine.
- [53 Paper Ledger](./53-paper-ledger.yaml): Archive, invoices, documentation. Cues: aged paper, ledger forms, warm amber, document archive, invoice-style controls.
- [76 Academic Journal](./76-academic-journal.yaml): Dense, scholarly, reserved. Cues: formal serif, paper neutrality, scholarly density, quiet borders, research publication.
- [90 Handwritten Notebook](./90-handwritten-notebook.yaml): Notebook, study notes, human and informal. Cues: paper feel, ink-like text, blue-line notebook, casual annotations, soft educational UI.
- [119 Pastel Academic](./119-pastel-academic.yaml): Notes, study, gentle hierarchy. Cues: pastel purple, study notes, gentle academic UI, soft badges, low-stress controls.

### Enterprise

- [06 Legal Casework](./06-legal-casework.yaml): Authoritative, evidence-led, discreet. Cues: midnight legal navy, burgundy case accents, document hierarchy, evidence metadata, confidential restraint.
- [09 Space Station](./09-space-station.yaml): Aerospace, utilitarian, high-reliability. Cues: NASA aesthetic, pure white panels, red hazard accents, technical sans-serif, aeronautical displays.
- [14 Data Dense](./14-data-dense.yaml): Compact, technical, analytical. Cues: dense analytics, compact spacing, monospace labels, small-radius controls, data-table temperament.
- [15 Warehouse Scanner](./15-warehouse-scanner.yaml): Barcode scanner, logistics, rugged mobile workflow. Cues: warehouse operations, scanner UI, yellow black safety, large touch targets, rugged workflow.
- [16 Aviation Control](./16-aviation-control.yaml): Air traffic control, high-stakes visibility. Cues: radar screen, amber and cyan on dark, aviation dashboard, high visibility, critical readouts.
- [25 Industrial Ops](./25-industrial-ops.yaml): Operational, heavy-duty, utilitarian. Cues: hazard amber, machine-room UI, dense operations, robust controls, utilitarian hierarchy.
- [29 Research Lab](./29-research-lab.yaml): Methodical, scientific, collaborative. Cues: laboratory white, cobalt protocol blue, precise annotations, experiment status, clean research workspace.
- [30 Supply Chain](./30-supply-chain.yaml): Connected, logistical, exception-focused. Cues: freight navy, signal orange, route status, dense logistics data, exception-first workflow.
- [38 People Ops](./38-people-ops.yaml): Human, organized, supportive. Cues: soft plum, peach warmth, people-centered cards, clear HR workflows, supportive enterprise tone.
- [77 Blueprint Enterprise](./77-blueprint-enterprise.yaml): Structured, architectural, planning-oriented. Cues: blueprint blues, technical labels, precise spacing, planning UI, architectural grid.
- [132 Executive Boardroom](./132-executive-boardroom.yaml): Formal, composed, C-suite reporting. Cues: executive dashboard, navy palette, formal hierarchy, subtle gold, boardroom restraint.

### Experimental

- [65 Bauhaus Grid](./65-bauhaus-grid.yaml): Geometric, poster-like, primary-color driven. Cues: strict geometry, primary accents, modular layout, hard edges, Bauhaus poster language.
- [68 Generative Grid](./68-generative-grid.yaml): Algorithmic, modular, kinetic. Cues: algorithmic grid, variable cell sizes, electric green, coded rhythm, procedural composition.
- [73 Brutalist Web](./73-brutalist-web.yaml): Raw HTML, default styles, anti-design. Cues: standard blue links, Times New Roman, pure white background, no rounded corners, raw early web.
- [85 Risograph Layers](./85-risograph-layers.yaml): Printed, imperfect, color-separated. Cues: fluorescent riso ink, misregistered layers, paper grain, two-color overlap, printmaking energy.
- [94 Noir Detective](./94-noir-detective.yaml): Moody, monochrome, cinematic investigation UI. Cues: film noir, high contrast grayscale, typewriter feel, shadow-heavy cards, case-file mood.
- [101 Deconstructed Type](./101-deconstructed-type.yaml): Disruptive, typographic, off-axis. Cues: oversized letterforms, off-axis alignment, acid orange, cropped typography, anti-grid tension.
- [116 Cyberpunk Street](./116-cyberpunk-street.yaml): Gritty, glowing, rebellious. Cues: neon yellow, dark grunge, high-tech low-life, street style, asymmetrical borders.
- [126 Memphis Party](./126-memphis-party.yaml): Chaotic, playful, decorative, high-energy. Cues: confetti accents, asymmetry, bold color pops, graphic contrast, fun rounded forms.
- [128 Biomechanical](./128-biomechanical.yaml): Alien, organic machinery, dark, unsettling. Cues: dark green tones, organic curves mixed with sharp edges, alien UI, Giger-esque, dark metallic.

### Futuristic

- [32 Orbital Sunrise](./32-orbital-sunrise.yaml): Hopeful, cinematic, aerospace. Cues: midnight indigo, sunrise orange rim, orbital horizon, aerospace typography, calm mission optimism.
- [40 Biotech Interface](./40-biotech-interface.yaml): Clinical, organic, computational. Cues: dark lab green, acid lime signals, cellular curves, scientific readouts, bio-digital precision.
- [51 Infrared Console](./51-infrared-console.yaml): Thermal, tactical, high-alert. Cues: black thermal field, infrared red, amber heat scale, scanline precision, alert-driven hierarchy.
- [55 Spatial Vision](./55-spatial-vision.yaml): Weightless, ambient, spatial. Cues: soft spatial layers, pearl translucent panels, depth through scale, ambient blue light, floating pill controls.
- [63 Glass Aurora](./63-glass-aurora.yaml): Blurred, luminous, layered. Cues: frosted glass, deep gradients, aurora glow, transparent surfaces, soft luminous CTAs.
- [64 Cyber Terminal](./64-cyber-terminal.yaml): Command-line, sharp, electric. Cues: black terminal, green phosphor, monospace, scanline mood, thin glowing borders.
- [74 Quantum Blueprint](./74-quantum-blueprint.yaml): Mathematical, deep-space, diagrammatic. Cues: navy blueprint field, cyan construction lines, coordinate labels, quantum diagrams, precise luminous grid.
- [84 Liquid Metal](./84-liquid-metal.yaml): Reflective, sculpted, precision industrial. Cues: brushed titanium, liquid chrome edges, cold graphite, machined controls, specular highlights.
- [120 Holographic Lab](./120-holographic-lab.yaml): Scientific, translucent, holographic interface. Cues: holographic panels, scientific UI, cyan violet shimmer, thin glass borders, lab console.
- [129 Neon Tokyo](./129-neon-tokyo.yaml): Nighttime metropolis, glowing signs, rainy streets. Cues: magenta and cyan, black background, neon glow, midnight city, high contrast digital.
- [134 AI Glow](./134-ai-glow.yaml): AI product, luminous, smooth. Cues: AI product, violet cyan gradient, soft glow, dark intelligence surface, smooth rounded controls.

- [47 Gaming HUD](./47-gaming-hud.yaml): Angular, high contrast, competitive. Cues: HUD interface, angular clipped panels, cyan glow, competitive game UI, sharp technical labels.
- [52 Fantasy Quest](./52-fantasy-quest.yaml): Mythic, ornate, adventurous. Cues: aged quest parchment, emerald jewel, engraved gold, fantasy inventory, heroic serif type.

- [36 Soft Geometry](./36-soft-geometry.yaml): Friendly, architectural, softly structured. Cues: cream canvas, muted primary shapes, large simple geometry, balanced whitespace, rounded architecture.
- [46 Soft SaaS](./46-soft-saas.yaml): Calm dashboard UI. Cues: light neutrals, quiet hierarchy, rounded cards, subtle shadows, enterprise SaaS polish.
- [59 Minimalist Portfolio](./59-minimalist-portfolio.yaml): Art gallery, severe restraint, stark contrast. Cues: pure white and black, extreme negative space, gallery wall, no decorative elements, content-first.
- [107 Warm Greige](./107-warm-greige.yaml): Domestic, muted, quietly premium. Cues: warm greige palette, linen-like surfaces, taupe details, gentle depth, comfortable restraint.
- [108 Dark Product](./108-dark-product.yaml): Modern app, dark-first. Cues: dark neutrals, zinc surfaces, low glare, clean app shell, compact SaaS controls.
- [123 Nordic Frost](./123-nordic-frost.yaml): Cold, airy, subdued. Cues: pale sky tones, lightweight typography, minimal borders, cold airiness, restrained controls.
- [125 Desert Minimal](./125-desert-minimal.yaml): Warm, spacious, subdued. Cues: sand palette, warm neutrals, quiet luxury-lite, large radii, spacious cards.

### Mobile

- [19 Mobility Map](./19-mobility-map.yaml): Urban, navigational, in-motion. Cues: cobalt map blue, lime route signal, floating map controls, travel time emphasis, street-level clarity.
- [20 Field Service](./20-field-service.yaml): Rugged, practical, outdoor-ready. Cues: safety yellow, utility navy, large touch targets, offline field forms, weatherproof contrast.
- [21 Camera Control](./21-camera-control.yaml): Professional, tactile, viewfinder-focused. Cues: matte camera black, exposure yellow, viewfinder framing, dial-like controls, pro capture workflow.
- [44 Health Tracker](./44-health-tracker.yaml): Personal, active, encouraging. Cues: coral activity accent, clean health cards, rounded biometrics, encouraging progress, soft wearable feel.
- [45 Habit Streak](./45-habit-streak.yaml): Motivating, warm, everyday. Cues: cream habit journal, forest green, orange streak accent, daily check-ins, rewarding progress.
- [56 Audio Player](./56-audio-player.yaml): Immersive, rhythmic, album-led. Cues: near-black player, electric purple, album art glow, large playback controls, immersive audio mood.
- [60 Pocket Finance](./60-pocket-finance.yaml): Compact, confident, money-smart. Cues: mint financial palette, bold balance figures, thumb-sized actions, compact cards, friendly trust cues.
- [61 Food Delivery](./61-food-delivery.yaml): Appetizing, quick, friendly. Cues: paprika orange, warm cream, menu card rhythm, fast checkout actions, rounded food labels.
- [91 Adaptive Mobile](./91-adaptive-mobile.yaml): Personalized, rounded, adaptive mobile feel. Cues: adaptive rounded UI, large rounded shapes, muted adaptive color, soft mobile surfaces, friendly system UI.
- [105 Social Creator](./105-social-creator.yaml): Expressive, creator-led, energetic. Cues: violet creator gradient, content-first cards, bright action pills, social engagement, camera-ready polish.
- [112 Translucent Mobile](./112-translucent-mobile.yaml): Native, translucent, polished. Cues: translucent mobile surfaces, frosted panels, rounded controls, blue accents, soft native depth.

- [102 Underwater Deep](./102-underwater-deep.yaml): Abyssal, bioluminescent, mysterious, flowing. Cues: deep ocean blue, bioluminescent cyan, flowing gradients, dark aquatic, abyssal calm.
- [106 Nature Organic](./106-nature-organic.yaml): Warm, sustainable, soft. Cues: organic greens, sustainable product, rounded natural forms, soft earth contrast, botanical calm.
- [113 Golden Hour](./113-golden-hour.yaml): Warm, luminous, fading sunlight, romantic. Cues: golden hour light, amber to orange gradients, soft long shadows, warmth, evening sun.
- [121 Zen Garden](./121-zen-garden.yaml): Quiet, breathable, natural, low-stimulus. Cues: earthy neutrals, soft green, ample whitespace, low contrast, calm rounded forms.
- [131 Oceanic Dashboard](./131-oceanic-dashboard.yaml): Marine, clean, research-instrument calm. Cues: marine blues, aqua accents, research instrument, fluid gradients, scientific calm.

### Playful

- [07 Neo Brutalist](./07-neo-brutalist.yaml): Bold, loud, tactile. Cues: heavy black outlines, offset shadows, flat bright color, no subtlety, poster-like controls.
- [69 Sticker Scrapbook](./69-sticker-scrapbook.yaml): Layered, handmade, exuberant. Cues: die-cut stickers, notebook paper, tape details, mixed bright colors, scrapbook layering.
- [72 Comic Panel](./72-comic-panel.yaml): Graphic-novel UI with energetic interaction. Cues: comic book, thick ink outlines, speech-bubble badges, yellow panels, action-oriented typography.
- [78 Anime Cel](./78-anime-cel.yaml): Flat colors, cel-shaded, animated sky. Cues: Studio Ghibli sky, flat cel shading, pure bright colors, clean line art, anime aesthetic.
- [82 Pastel Goth](./82-pastel-goth.yaml): Cute but dark, spooky pastel, alternative. Cues: black and pastel pink, creepy cute, sharp dark edges with soft colors, alternative teen, gothic lolita.
- [86 Inflatable UI](./86-inflatable-ui.yaml): Bouncy, glossy, oversized. Cues: inflated pill shapes, pool-toy colors, soft specular shine, oversized rounded controls, buoyant depth.
- [87 Kawaii Mascot UI](./87-kawaii-mascot-ui.yaml): Cute, soft, friendly, sticker-like. Cues: kawaii softness, pastel stickers, rounded pill controls, friendly badges, gentle playful hierarchy.
- [88 Candy Pop](./88-candy-pop.yaml): Bright, friendly, rounded. Cues: bubble radii, pink and cyan, friendly contrast, soft candy colors, playful badges.
- [89 Kids Learning](./89-kids-learning.yaml): Friendly, chunky, educational. Cues: chunky controls, primary classroom palette, friendly buttons, large radii, educational app mood.
- [111 Claymorphism](./111-claymorphism.yaml): Soft, puffy, physical. Cues: puffy controls, warm orange, inner shadows, soft plastic, rounded tactile components.

### System

- [01 Transit Wayfinding](./01-transit-wayfinding.yaml): Directional, metropolitan, immediate. Cues: route map colors, black wayfinding type, yellow information panels, hard grid, at-a-glance navigation.
- [03 E-ink Reader](./03-e-ink-reader.yaml): Grayscale, eye-friendly, distraction-free. Cues: e-ink display, pure grayscale, no anti-aliasing feel, high legibility, monochrome ink.
- [05 Public Service](./05-public-service.yaml): Official, accessible, reassuring. Cues: civic blue, service yellow, plain typography, prominent help states, government clarity.
- [17 Emergency Console](./17-emergency-console.yaml): Urgent, legible, operational. Cues: white command surface, signal red, large status labels, redundant alert cues, glove-friendly controls.
- [18 DevOps Status](./18-devops-status.yaml): Observable, dependable, incident-ready. Cues: charcoal operations UI, status green, amber incident states, monospace metadata, compact monitoring rhythm.
- [26 High Contrast A11y](./26-high-contrast-a11y.yaml): Accessible, explicit, readable. Cues: maximum contrast, strong focus rings, black outlines, readability first, clear interaction states.
- [28 Education Portal](./28-education-portal.yaml): Welcoming, structured, studious. Cues: ink indigo, warm workbook paper, clear lesson hierarchy, supportive feedback, calm academic UI.
- [62 Developer Docs](./62-developer-docs.yaml): Technical, readable, reference-style. Cues: developer docs, dark reference UI, monospace labels, violet accents, code-adjacent hierarchy.
- [70 Healthcare Calm](./70-healthcare-calm.yaml): Clean, accessible, clinical. Cues: teal accents, clinical calm, high readability, soft white surfaces, accessible controls.
- [71 Material Clean](./71-material-clean.yaml): Familiar, structured, practical. Cues: material design, standard elevation, blue focus, functional controls, straightforward hierarchy.
- [93 Desktop Fluent](./93-desktop-fluent.yaml): Desktop-like, neutral, efficient. Cues: desktop shell, neutral grays, blue action color, efficient density, familiar enterprise UI.
- [130 Neumorphic Light](./130-neumorphic-light.yaml): Soft plastic, extruded surfaces, uniform color. Cues: neumorphism, same color background and surface, drop shadow and inner shadow, soft extruded plastic, minimalist pop.
